'''âng-b-p''' ('''kangabap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:question|question]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:question|question]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| kangabap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingabap|thingabap]] || [[word:jingabap|jingabap]] || [[word:shingabap|shingabap]] || [[word:kingabap|kingabap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungabap|thuthungabap]] || [[word:jujungabap|jujungabap]] || [[word:shushungabap|shushungabap]] || [[word:kukungabap|kukungabap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungabap|thungabap]] || [[word:jungabap|jungabap]] || [[word:shungabap|shungabap]] || [[word:kungabap|kungabap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungabap|thungabap]] || [[word:jungabap|jungabap]] || [[word:shungabap|shungabap]] || [[word:kungabap|kungabap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengabap|thengabap]] || [[word:jengabap|jengabap]] || [[word:shengabap|shengabap]] || [[word:kengabap|kengabap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongabap|thothongabap]] || [[word:jojongabap|jojongabap]] || [[word:shoshongabap|shoshongabap]] || [[word:kokongabap|kokongabap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongabap|thongabap]] || [[word:jongabap|jongabap]] || [[word:shongabap|shongabap]] || [[word:kongabap|kongabap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongabap|thongabap]] || [[word:jongabap|jongabap]] || [[word:shongabap|shongabap]] || [[word:kongabap|kongabap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngabap|thĂŠngabap]] || [[word:jĂŠngabap|jĂŠngabap]] || [[word:shĂŠngabap|shĂŠngabap]] || [[word:kĂŠngabap|kĂŠngabap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangabap|thathangabap]] || [[word:jajangabap|jajangabap]] || [[word:shashangabap|shashangabap]] || [[word:kakangabap|kakangabap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangabap|thangabap]] || [[word:jangabap|jangabap]] || [[word:shangabap|shangabap]] || [[word:kangabap|kangabap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangabap|thangabap]] || [[word:jangabap|jangabap]] || [[word:shangabap|shangabap]] || [[word:kangabap|kangabap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangabap|shangabap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangabap|goshangabap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangabap|gokishangabap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangabapnĂŒ|shangabapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangabapnknĂŒ|goshangabapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabapnĂŒ|gokishangabapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangabapshĂ«|shangabapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangabapnkshĂ«|goshangabapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangabapshĂ«|gokishangabapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabapro|shangabapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabapnkro|goshangabapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabapro|gokishangabapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabapmu|shangabapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabapnkmu|goshangabapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabapmu|gokishangabapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangabapsher|shangabapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangabapnksher|goshangabapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangabapsher|gokishangabapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangabapng|shangabapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangabapnkng|goshangabapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangabapng|gokishangabapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangabapya|shangabapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangabapnkya|goshangabapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangabapya|gokishangabapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangabapyam|shangabapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangabapnkyam|goshangabapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangabapyam|gokishangabapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangabapnĂŒshĂ«|shangabapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangabapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangabapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangabapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangabapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabapnĂŒro|shangabapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabapnknĂŒro|goshangabapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabapnĂŒro|gokishangabapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabapnĂŒmu|shangabapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabapnknĂŒmu|goshangabapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabapnĂŒmu|gokishangabapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangabapshĂ«nĂŒ|shangabapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangabapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangabapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangabapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabapshĂ«ro|shangabapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabapnkshĂ«ro|goshangabapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabapshĂ«ro|gokishangabapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabapshĂ«mu|shangabapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabapnkshĂ«mu|goshangabapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabapshĂ«mu|gokishangabapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangabapronĂŒ|shangabapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangabapnkronĂŒ|goshangabapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabapronĂŒ|gokishangabapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangabaproshĂ«|shangabaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangabapnkroshĂ«|goshangabapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangabaproshĂ«|gokishangabaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabapromu|shangabapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabapnkromu|goshangabapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabapromu|gokishangabapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangabapmunĂŒ|shangabapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangabapnkmunĂŒ|goshangabapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabapmunĂŒ|gokishangabapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangabapmushĂ«|shangabapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangabapnkmushĂ«|goshangabapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangabapmushĂ«|gokishangabapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabapmuro|shangabapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabapnkmuro|goshangabapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabapmuro|gokishangabapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
